{{Quote|The owner of the ''Ebon Hawk'' is always welcome in the Dreshdae Cantina.|translated=1|Mika greeting Revan|<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Mika Dorin''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as the manager of [[The Drunk Side]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Dreshdae]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], in [[3956 BBY]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He, along with his partner [[Ziagrom]], learned of the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] true identity after the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''{{'s}} capture by the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']]. He offered Revan a look at his premium items and constantly referred to him as Lord Revan.

==Behind the scenes==
Mika Dorin is incorrectly described as a pazaak player in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'',<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I||Dorin, Mika}}</ref> a description that fits [[Toll Apkar]], another Rodian present in the cantina.<ref name="KOTOR" />
